stemHtml: An aircraft is maintaining straight and level flight with constant power and no flaps deployed. In this condition the C<sub>L </sub>= 0.28. What will happen to C<sub>L</sub>, if the pilot extends the flaps and decreases the speed to maintain straight and level flight?

options.a: C<sub>L</sub> higher than 0.28 because C<sub>L</sub> always increases with the deployment of flaps.
options.b: C<sub>L</sub> higher than 0.28 to keep the the same altitude.
options.d: C<sub>L</sub> is still 0.28 because it is independent on the deployment of flaps.
